title: Margbensonia neriifolia
taxonomy: Margbensonia neriifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the stovepipe bush or stovepipe tree family. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of Central America and Mexico. Within the Clusiaceae family, Margbensonia neriifolia is placed in the genus Margbensonia. The classification of the plant is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Magnoliophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Malpighiales, Family: Clusiaceae, Genus: Margbensonia, Species: M. neriifolia. Further research may provide additional insight into the plant's classification.
